message:
fix: Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15 in more Lib files

Updated ArrayList initialization and method calls to use new Zig 0.15 API:
- codecs.zig: IncrementalEncoder/Decoder, charmapEncode/Decode, search_functions
- shlex.zig: Shlex struct, split/quote/join functions
- dataclasses/repr.zig: generateRepr, formatField
- types.zig: SimpleNamespace.repr
- weakref/weakset.zig: WeakSet struct
- weakref/weakdict.zig: WeakKeyDictionary, WeakValueDictionary
- _pyio/string_io.zig: StringIO struct
- _pyio/buffered.zig: BufferedReader.readline
- dis/analysis.zig: findlabels
- pstats/stats.zig: Stats struct
- sched/scheduler.zig: getQueue
- configparser/sections.zig: getSections
